channel.title: Verza TV News
channel.description: News and announcements from Verza TV — premium short-form vertical entertainment and serialized micro dramas.

item.title: Verza TV: The First U.S. Platform for Premium Vertical Micro Dramas
item.description: Founded by Alan Mruvka, creator of E! Entertainment Television, Verza TV is building the next generation of premium short-form vertical entertainment.
